allOf.description: Exactly one image selector must be set: use a digest for immutable deploys or a tag for mutable/dev flows, never both.

description: Strict allowlist for supported Helm values. Unknown top-level keys are rejected so chart profiles fail fast when they drift from the published contract.

autoscaling.description: Deprecated alias for hpa. Prefer hpa for current chart values, but keep this validated for compatibility surfaces.

maxReplicas.description: Must be greater than or equal to autoscaling.minReplicas. Portable Helm JSON Schema cannot compare sibling integers, so callers must keep this bound coherent.

maxDelayMs.description: Must be greater than or equal to cache.warmup.retry.baseDelayMs. Portable JSON Schema cannot compare sibling integers, so callers must keep this bound coherent.

maxReplicas.description: Must be greater than or equal to hpa.minReplicas. Portable Helm JSON Schema cannot compare sibling integers, so the chart enforces this relation during template rendering.

image.description: Set exactly one of image.digest or image.tag. Digest is preferred for immutable production rollouts.

ingressMode.description: Top-level alias for networkPolicy.ingress.mode. Prefer this when you want a single explicit ingress policy selector.

mode.description: Top-level alias for networkPolicy.egress.mode. Atlas treats NetworkPolicy as east-west isolation with optional internet egress limiting.

monitoring.description: Preferred home for the monitoring namespace selector; keep networkPolicy.allowMonitoringNamespace accepted during the compatibility window.

securityContext.description: Deprecated alias for containerSecurityContext. Prefer containerSecurityContext for new values files.

serviceMonitor.description: Deprecated alias for metrics.serviceMonitor. Prefer metrics.serviceMonitor for new values files.

title: bijux-atlas chart values
